prompt_en: pixel art icon, 64x64, minimalist dark fantasy, inventory or backpack symbol, stylized bag or grid of item slots, charcoal background (#1a1a24), neon purple accents (#b700ff) suggesting magical storage, clean silhouette, high contrast, 16-32bit inspired, atmospheric, muted dark palette, sharp crisp pixels, no blur, centered composition, mystical energy
